rationale: An Islamic educational platform for children requires warmth, trust, and clarity. Using a warm sand base with deep emerald and terracotta accents provides a calm, grounded environment that perfectly complements the existing interactive HTML materials without resorting to cliche templates.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing (p-8, p-12) to give the interface an elegant, uncrowded feel.
spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Bento Grid Protocol - Mode A (Tetris) for Landing. Mode B (Control Room) for User/Admin Dashboard.

buttons.primary: bg-[#064E3B] text-white rounded-2xl px-6 py-3 font-medium hover:bg-[#043B2C] transition-colors shadow-sm
buttons.secondary: bg-[#F4F1EA] text-[#1C1917] rounded-2xl px-6 py-3 font-medium hover:bg-[#E7E5DF] transition-colors
buttons.accent: bg-[#D97757] text-white rounded-2xl px-6 py-3 font-medium hover:bg-[#C26244] transition-colors shadow-sm

cards.default: bg-white rounded-3xl border border-[#E7E5DF] shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgba(0,0,0,0.04)] p-8
cards.bento_item: bg-[#F4F1EA] rounded-3xl p-8 flex flex-col justify-between overflow-hidden relative
cards.locked_item: bg-[#F4F1EA] opacity-70 grayscale-[50%] rounded-3xl p-8 border border-dashed border-[#A8A29E]

components.navbar: Sticky top-0 z-50 bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/40 px-6 py-4 flex justify-between items-center

landing_home.layout: Asymmetric bento grid hero. Large welcoming H1, staggered image cards.
landing_home.features: Hero with elegant Arabic Bismillah overlay, stats bento box, floating geometric patterns.

auth.left: Sticky image panel with warm lighting and soft overlay.
auth.right: Clean centered form with soft inputs (Shadcn customized).

library_iqro_1_to_6.styling: Iqro 1-4 use 'locked_item' styling with lock icons and 'Coming Soon' overlay. Iqro 5-6 are highly vibrant 'cards' with primary CTAs to 'Lanjut Belajar' (Continue Learning).
library_iqro_1_to_6.interaction: Hover effects on active cards (-translate-y-1, increased shadow).

material_viewer.topbar: Minimal glassmorphism nav with 'Back to Library' and current volume title.
material_viewer.content: Iframe container scaling dynamically. Background matching the HTML file's palette to feel seamless.

user_dashboard.widgets: Progress doughnut chart (accent terracotta/gold), recent activity list, comments/discussions summary.

admin_panel.layout: Sidebar navigation + Content Area. Dense list views.
admin_panel.styling: Crisp borders, white background, Shadcn data tables for material management and user tracking.

hero_background.usage: Use as a very low opacity (5-10%) background texture for the hero section or auth screen left panel to add subtle Islamic geometry.

hero_image.usage: Use in the hero bento grid as the main lifestyle image representing focused learning.

library_placeholder.usage: Use as thumbnail covers for the Iqro volumes in the library grid if custom graphics are not available.

testing_and_accessibility.data_testid_rules: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, tabs, cards) MUST have a kebab-case data-testid (e.g., 'login-submit-button', 'iqro-5-card', 'admin-upload-html').
testing_and_accessibility.contrast: Ensure text over geometric backgrounds has sufficient contrast (use text-shadow or backdrop-blur under text).

instructions_to_main_agent: Install Google Fonts for Fraunces, Manrope, and Amiri. Configure them in tailwind.config.js.
Do NOT use HTML native datepickers or selects. Use Shadcn components and customize them with the soft rounded-2xl styles.
Build the bento grids using direct children of grid containers. Avoid wrapper divs that break grid flow.
Ensure the Material Viewer iframe handles the provided HTML files gracefully. The iframe should take up maximal available space below the header.
For the library placeholders (Iqro 1-4), make sure they look visually distinct (locked/disabled) from the active Iqro 5 & 6.
Do not use generic blue/purple colors. Stick strictly to the defined deep emerald, terracotta, and warm gold.
